task.label: Require verification of identity of customer and beneficial owner
Verify identity of customer and beneficial owner

conditions.condition: before the establishment of a business relationship or the carrying out of the transaction

task.label: Allow verification of identity to be completed during establishment of business relationship

conditions.condition: if necessary so as not to interrupt the normal conduct of business
where there is little risk of money laundering or terrorist financing

exception.description: by way of derogation from paragraph 1

task.label: Complete verification procedures as soon as practicable after initial contact

conditions.condition: where verification of identity is allowed to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship[CROSS_REF]

task.label: Allow opening of an account with a credit institution

conditions.condition: provided that there are adequate safeguards in place to ensure that transactions are not carried out by the customer or on its behalf until full compliance with CDD requirements

exception.description: by way of derogation from paragraph 1

task.label: Require obliged entities to follow CDD non-compliance procedures

conditions.condition: where an obliged entity is unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

task.label: Carry out a transaction through a bank account

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in or concerning judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in or concerning judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in or concerning judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in or concerning judicial proceedings

task.label: Consider making a suspicious transaction report to the FIU

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in or concerning judicial proceedings

task.label: Apply first subparagraph to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors

conditions.condition: only to the strict extent that those persons ascertain the legal position of their client, or perform the task of defending or representing that client in or concerning judicial proceedings

task.label: Require obliged entities to apply CDD measures to new and existing customers
Apply CDD measures to new and existing customers on a risk-sensitive basis

conditions.condition: including at times when the relevant circumstances of a customer change
